extra.reason: Repo structure, .gitignore, AGPL-3.0 license, README, docs/ established; backend set to fully containerized
Containerized PocketBase v0.39.4 backend: Dockerfile + compose + README; build/health smoke-tested OK; no host binary, no .env
very_good app scaffolded (android/ios/web), pub workspace wired, analyze clean, 8 tests pass

Core deps added (riverpod/go_router/pocketbase/freezed/flutter_map/secure_storage/shared_preferences + codegen+riverpod_lint); bloc removed, counter demo replaced with Riverpod ProviderScope; analyze clean, tests pass, build_runner codegen verified end-to-end

App identity + native flavors (from scaffold) confirmed; dart-define-from-file config layer added (dart_defines/*.json + AppEnvironment), verified values flow through; analyze clean, tests pass. Icon/splash deferred to owner (federfall-gyt).

CI workflow (format→analyze→test+coverage 80% gate, Flutter 3.44.3 pinned) added and dry-run green locally end-to-end; added app_environment test (100% app coverage). Branch protection deferred until a remote exists.

organisations collection (single seed row 'Federfall', id org00000default) + users auth collection extended with role/org/is_active/invited_by/phone. Migration 1700000001 verified up+down on clean PB 0.39.4 instance.

animals collection: name(presentable), species, sex, is_owned, lifetime_status, tags(json), notes, org. current_aviary relation deferred to FED-1.8 (aviaries collection doesn't exist yet). Verified up+down on clean PB 0.39.4.

finders (PII, all-optional contact fields) + cases (care episode: animal/case_number[unique idx]/age_class/intake+find_geo geoPoint/reasons multi-select/quarantine/status/is_releasable/active_carer/optional exam_* fields/org). Verified up+down on clean PB 0.39.4.

finders (PII, all-optional contact fields) + cases (care episode: animal/case_number[unique idx]/age_class/intake+find_geo geoPoint/reasons multi-select/quarantine/status/is_releasable/active_carer/optional exam_* fields/org). Verified up+down on clean PB 0.39.4.

Phase-1 leaf schema migrations 1700000005-09: markings (code-indexed, re-id), conditions+case_conditions code list, clinical logs (weights/medications/journal_entries/placements), aviaries+dispositions (+ deferred animals.current_aviary), case_shares (unique case+user idx). All verified up+down on clean PB 0.39.4.

Phase-1 leaf schema migrations 1700000005-09: markings (code-indexed, re-id), conditions+case_conditions code list, clinical logs (weights/medications/journal_entries/placements), aviaries+dispositions (+ deferred animals.current_aviary), case_shares (unique case+user idx). All verified up+down on clean PB 0.39.4.

Phase-1 leaf schema migrations 1700000005-09: markings (code-indexed, re-id), conditions+case_conditions code list, clinical logs (weights/medications/journal_entries/placements), aviaries+dispositions (+ deferred animals.current_aviary), case_shares (unique case+user idx). All verified up+down on clean PB 0.39.4.

Phase-1 leaf schema migrations 1700000005-09: markings (code-indexed, re-id), conditions+case_conditions code list, clinical logs (weights/medications/journal_entries/placements), aviaries+dispositions (+ deferred animals.current_aviary), case_shares (unique case+user idx). All verified up+down on clean PB 0.39.4.

Phase-1 leaf schema migrations 1700000005-09: markings (code-indexed, re-id), conditions+case_conditions code list, clinical logs (weights/medications/journal_entries/placements), aviaries+dispositions (+ deferred animals.current_aviary), case_shares (unique case+user idx). All verified up+down on clean PB 0.39.4.

API access rules on all 14 app collections + users authRule(is_active). Private-by-default + case_shares(read/edit) + role scope + org scope; finders PII gated by case visibility; animals/markings org-readable for re-ID. Edit-share correlation verified safe on PB 0.39.4. End-to-end tested across owner/read/edit/outsider/supervisor/coordinator + deactivated-auth + down-revert.

pb_hooks/main.pb.js: (1) cases auto case_number per-year+org / quarantine_until +14d / status default; (2) dispositions maintain case.status + animal.lifetime_status/current_aviary; (3) share-on-handoff (prev carer keeps read); (4) users field-guard blocks role/org/is_active/verified escalation by non-supervisors. Migration 1700000011 widens users.updateRule to self+supervisor (safe behind guard). All 5 behaviors verified live on PB 0.39.4; learned PB hook callbacks run in isolated VMs so helpers must be inlined.

Seeded 22 German feral-pigeon conditions into org00000default (single 'label' field per FED-1.6; PMV + Ornithose/Chlamydiose flagged is_notifiable). reasons-for-admission already an inline cases enum (FED-1.3), not seeded. Verified up+down on clean PB 0.39.4.

backend/pocketbase/tests/{run.sh,test_rules.py}: throwaway-instance suite, 41 assertions covering schema/seed, all FED-1.12 hooks (case_number/quarantine/status/dispositions/share-on-handoff/field-guard) and the FED-1.11 rule matrix (private-default, read/edit shares incl. no-escalation, coordinator all-read, supervisor all, finder-PII gating, handoff visibility, deactivated-auth, org isolation). Wired into CI as 'backend-rules' job. Exit codes verified (pass=0, fail!=0).

All 13 children complete (FED-1.1–1.13). Backend schema (15 collections), API access rules (security boundary), JS hooks (case_number/quarantine/status/handoff/field-guard), German conditions seed, and a 41-assertion rule/hook test suite wired into CI. DoD met: schema reproducible from migrations on a clean instance; access rules proven by tests; sample data loads.
federfall_models package: 15 freezed models + RecordModel mappers, enums with wire values, PB date/geo/empty-string converters, 13 passing tests. Registered in workspace.

PocketBase client provider built async over AsyncAuthStore; platform auth token storage (secure on native, prefs on web); ServerConfig resolution (web=origin, native=persisted/unconfigured) with setServerUrl/clearServerUrl; client keyed on config so switching servers rebuilds. 6 passing tests.

Material 3 theme (teal-green seed, light+dark, tuned components) + spacing tokens; German-default l10n with base strings (loading/error/actions/validation); base widgets (LoadingView, ErrorView, EmptyView, AsyncValueView, PrimaryButton, AppTextField) + localized Validators. 12 new tests; app uses AppTheme + de locale.

go_router with two-stage redirect gate (native-unconfigured→/setup, unauthenticated→/login, else home), splash while resolving, 404 errorBuilder, web path-URL strategy via conditional-import shim. AuthStatus provider exposes valid-session signal for the gate. Placeholder screens for FED-3.0/3.1/3.3. 4 gate tests.

federfall_data package: generic Repository<T> interface + PbRepository base (CRUD, bound-param filters, ClientException→RepositoryException), AuthRepository (signIn/refresh/signOut/currentUser/changes), and typed repos for all collections (cases w/ interface for cache decorator, animals, finders, aviaries, conditions+case_conditions, weights/meds/journal/placements, markings, dispositions, case_shares) with case-scoped query helpers. App-side keepAlive providers bind each repo to the async client. 13 data tests + analyze clean.

App-wide error handling & logging: AppLogger facade (level-gated, dart:developer) + provider; LoggingProviderObserver logs all provider failures; bootstrap wires FlutterError.onError + PlatformDispatcher.onError + observer through one logger. Result<T> (Ok/Err + guard/fold) for imperative outcomes. Localized errorMessage() maps RepositoryErrorKind→l10n. 7 tests.

Offline read cache generalized to ALL collections (not just cases). Pluggable RecordCache interface baked into PbRepository: every getOne/list caches raw records and is served from cache on network failure; writes refresh/evict. NoopRecordCache default keeps it opt-in. App provides bounded shared_preferences-backed PrefsRecordCache wired into all 14 repo providers. 13 cache/repo tests (7 data + 6 app).

Offline read cache generalized to ALL collections (not just cases). Pluggable RecordCache interface baked into PbRepository: every getOne/list caches raw records and is served from cache on network failure; writes refresh/evict. NoopRecordCache default keeps it opt-in. App provides bounded shared_preferences-backed PrefsRecordCache wired into all 14 repo providers. 13 cache/repo tests (7 data + 6 app).
All 7 Phase 2 tasks complete: models+mappers, PB client+auth store, repository layer, routing gate, theming+l10n+widgets, offline read cache (generalized to all collections), error handling+logging.

Implemented server-config validation (normalizeServerUrl + ServerProbe: probe /api/health, classify invalid/unreachable/not-Federfall) and the real first-run setup screen (form, inline errors, busy state, persist-on-success → gate routes to login). Phase 2 had already wired ServerConfig/storage/controller/router-gate/PB-provider. 'Switch server' UI entry point deferred to FED-3.1 login (clearServerUrl mechanism in place). 54 tests pass, analyzer clean.

Login & session: email+password sign-in via AuthRepository against the configured server; reactive currentUser provider; home shell shows signed-in user + logout (signOut → gate → /login, server URL kept); native-only 'switch server' clears URL back to /setup. Session restore via persisted AsyncAuthStore token + AuthStatus. l10n (en+de) + widget tests. 60 tests pass, analyzer clean.

Minimal case slice: create-case (name+species+reason → creates animal then case with active_carer=self; hooks fill case_number/status/quarantine), my-cases list on home (forCarer, newest first, +FAB, logout), case detail stub (case number/animal/status/reasons). Added CasesRepository.forCarer. Code-list labels (AdmissionReason/CaseStatus) localized via arb. Tests: forCarer, home (empty/list/logout), new-case (create + reason-required). 64 app + data tests pass, analyzer clean.

Role-gated nav & profile: canManageTeam(role) capability helper (UI gate; server API rules remain the boundary), supervisor-only Verwaltung/admin entry in home app bar + screen-level role guard (stub for FED-3.2), profile screen (name/email/localized role) with sign-out relocated from home. UserRole labels localized via arb. Tests: home role-gating (carer hides admin / supervisor shows), profile (role+signout), admin gate (supervisor vs carer). 69 app tests pass, analyzer clean.

Invite/approval flow (PocketBase-native, SMTP-assumed): app-level supervisor invites via AuthRepository.inviteUser (creates users record active+throwaway pw, then requestPasswordReset email); invitee follows the emailed link to /auth/confirm-reset (gate opened for no-session), sets password via confirmPasswordReset, then logs in. Admin screen now hosts the invite form (email/name/role, supervisor-gated). No custom collection/endpoint. Deploy config (SMTP + reset email template URL) tracked in federfall-353. Tests: repo inviteUser/confirmPasswordReset, admin invite + auth gate, confirm-reset success/mismatch/missing-token, router gate reachability. 74 app + 24 data tests pass.

Full intake form: animal (name/species/sex), intake (multi-select reasons, age class, found/admitted dates, find location, weight, notes) and optional finder capture. Photo upload deferred to FED-4.7 (needs file-upload infra); map-based find-location is FED-4.2.

Case detail overview: name-first header (animal name → species · case number, status chip), intake summary card incl. linked finder, and a chronological timeline seeded from intake milestones for later Phase 4 slices to extend.

Journal: dated free-text entries with photo attachments. Added multipart file-upload to the repository layer (createWithFiles + fileUrl with thumbnails); JournalSection on case detail (newest-first, photo thumbnails opening full-size), and a new-entry bottom sheet with gallery/camera picking via image_picker. iOS photo/camera usage descriptions added. Widget + data-layer tests.

Journal CRUD complete: edit an entry's note/date with add/remove of attachments, and delete with confirm. Added updateWithFiles() (multipart, keep-list pattern) to the repo; generalized the entry sheet to create-or-edit; per-entry overflow menu for edit/delete. Tests for edit (drops removed attachment), delete, and updateWithFiles.

Case detail now has one unified chronology: a shared TimelineItem (icon-dot rail + connecting line + date header) renders every event, so journal entries and intake milestones look consistent and all carry their date. Events interleave newest-first; future record kinds slot in. Replaces the separate JournalSection/_TimelineSection. Tests for ordering + empty state.

Weights: add/edit/delete a measurement (grams, accepts comma decimals; date; optional note) as a case-chronology event, plus a fl_chart weight-trend line chart on case detail (shown at >=2 points). Each measurement is a TimelineItem alongside journal/milestones; the timeline header add-menu now offers note vs weight. Tests for sheet save/validation, tile delete, timeline placement, trend chart.

Case detail is now a persistent name-first header over two tabs: Overview (weight trend + intake summary) and History (the unified CaseTimeline, title suppressed since the tab names it). Keeps the screen short as more record kinds land. Detail test updated to switch tabs.

Conditions/diagnoses: add/edit/delete a diagnosis as a chronology event. Condition field is a type-ahead over the seeded code list with free-text fallback (final text matched to a code-list label -> condition relation, else free_text). Certainty segmented control, onset + optional resolved dates, notes. Timeline tile resolves the label, shows certainty + a Meldepflichtig badge for notifiable diseases. Tests for code-list match, free text, validation, tile render, delete.

Medications as plan + dose log. New medication_administrations backend collection (migration + child access rules + rule test). Models/repo/providers for both. Prescription sheet (drug/dose/route/frequency/dates/controlled/instructions/prescriber) and dose sheet (prefill+link from a plan, or ad-hoc; administered_by=carer). Both are timeline events; prescription tile has Log dose / edit / delete + controlled badge. Timeline add-menu gains prescription + dose. NOTE: frequency is free-text; semantic/structured frequency for reminders tracked separately.

Medication frequency is now structured + reminder-ready: medications gains frequency_kind (once|scheduled|as_needed) + interval_hours (migration). Prescription form uses interval presets (once/q24/q12/q8/q6/q48/custom/PRN) mapping to (kind, hours); tile shows a derived label (e.g. 'Twice daily', 'Every 10 h'). Free-text frequency kept as an optional note. A reminder = last administration + interval_hours. Tests for default+chosen preset and tile label.

Markings + re-identification. Apply/edit/remove/delete a ring/marker/chip (type, code, colour, scheme, applied date) as a timeline event on the animal; 'Mark removed' records removed_at/reason and deactivates. Re-identification at intake: search existing animals by active ring code or name, show matches with their active markings, and link the new case to the chosen animal (showing prior-case count) instead of creating a fresh one. Timeline add-menu gains marking. Uses existing markings collection/rules (no migration). Tests for apply, tile+mark-removed, and the intake link flow.

Placements / handoff. New users repository (list active org members) for carer pickers. Placement sheet records a move/handoff (carer, where/area/enclosure, date, condition, comments) as a timeline event; choosing a carer other than the current active carer is a handoff — updates cases.active_carer (backend hook then auto-shares the previous carer read) and records from->to. Placement tile resolves carer names and shows handoff vs move; edit/delete. Timeline add-menu gains 'Hand off / move'. No migration (placements collection + rules + handoff hook already existed). Tests for handoff, plain move, tile.

Intake photos wired in using the FED-4.7 file-upload infra. Intake form stages photos (gallery/camera) via a reusable StagedPhotos widget; on create with photos it uses casesRepository.createWithFiles to upload them to the cases.intake_photos file field (else plain create). Case detail Overview shows intake-photo thumbnails (tap = full-size). casesRepositoryProvider now returns PbCasesRepository to expose createWithFiles/fileUrl. Tests for the upload path.

Find-location: flutter_map (OSM, tile URL configurable via dart-define) + geocoding via a backend proxy (pb_hooks/geocode.pb.js, auth-only /api/federfall/geocode + /reverse) forwarding to a configurable Nominatim (FEDERFALL_NOMINATIM_URL, optional FEDERFALL_GEOCODER_KEY, FEDERFALL_USER_AGENT). GeocodingRepository decouples the geocoder. Picker (search=forward, tap=reverse) wired into intake (stores find_geo/find_location/city/region); read-only mini-map on detail. VERIFIED end-to-end on live PB against public OSM (works with a plain UA; note Nominatim blocks placeholder domains like example.org — default UA carries no address). Geocoding-repo tests pass.

Disposition (release/died/euthanized/transferred/returned-to-owner) as a terminal timeline event. Disposition sheet with type selector revealing relevant fields: release (location via map picker + geo + release type + optional vet sign-off), transfer (destination + type), euthanasia (free-text performing vet — vets don't log in — instead of a sign-off toggle, per user). disposed_at defaults to today, selectable. Backend hook handles the side effects (case status=disposed, animal lifetime_status). 'Record outcome' in the timeline add-menu (hidden once disposed). placed_in_aviary excluded (FED-4.12, needs aviaries). Migration adds dispositions.vet. Also: intake found/admitted dates now default to today. Tests for death/release/euthanasia-vet + tile.

Adaptive nav shell: StatefulShellRoute (Dashboard/Cases/Animals) with NavigationBar<600w / NavigationRail>=600w (extended>=840). Profile+admin via shared AccountActions in each tab app bar. HomeScreen split into CasesScreen + Dashboard/Animals placeholders. Tests + analyze green.

Dashboard: KPI cards (active cases, intakes this year), active-case status breakdown, and quarantine-ending-soon list (overdue+next 7d, taps to case detail). Scope follows access rules via repo.list() (carer own+shared, coord/sup org-wide). Pure buildDashboardSummary + provider; unit + widget tests. Card tap-through to pre-filtered all-cases browser awaits FED-7.4.

All-cases browser: scope toggle (mine/all, server-scoped), activity (active/closed/all), species, admission date-range filters + text search (case no / animal name). Compact UI — search always visible, secondary filters in a badged filter bottom-sheet that updates live. Pure filterCases() over one client-side fetch (cases+animals); unit + widget tests. Replaced dead myCasesProvider; writes now refresh casesBrowserData+dashboardSummary. Dashboard->browser deep-link pre-filter filed as follow-up.

Animals registry: searchable list of org animals (org-wide readable). Row shows name, species, active marking codes, lifetime status. Search matches name or active ring/chip code. Joins animals+active markings in one fetch; pure filterAnimals() unit-tested + widget tests. Rows tap to animal lifetime detail via new /animals/:id route (placeholder screen now, body filled by FED-7.6). Added lifetimeStatusLabel + l10n. Unblocks FED-7.6.

Animal lifetime detail: identity (name/species/sex + lifetime-status chip), all markings (active+historic), every case newest-first. Accessible cases tap into case detail; inaccessible ones render as non-tappable stubs (number/status/dates + no-access badge) sourced from a new org-wide case_summaries PB view (migration 1700000016) that projects only non-clinical columns. New CaseSummary model + repo + animalLifetime provider. Verified on live PB: 5 new rule tests (48 total) prove summary readable org-wide, no clinical leak, org isolation. Flutter mapper+widget tests green.

Extracted DetailHeader (lib/ui/widgets/detail_header.dart): title + optional muted subtitle + optional status chip + optional leading slot (for ctw.7 avatar). Case _Header and animal _Identity both delegate to it; animal screen dropped its Card so both match the plain case-overview style. 3 widget tests; analyze clean, 145 tests green.

Header avatar (round): animal photo -> latest case intake photo -> placeholder, via pure pickAvatarSource + animalAvatarUrl provider + AnimalAvatar widget. Editable (gallery/camera/remove) from both animal & case headers. Backend animals.photo file field (migration 1700000017) verified on live PB (upload+readback rule test, 50 checks). Case header renders avatar from case.animal id so header never briefly centres. analyze clean, 148+14 tests green.

Case Overview now shows an 'Andere Fälle'/'Other cases' card: animal's other cases (current excluded), newest-first, hidden when none. Reuses animalLifetimeProvider (FED-7.6) so inaccessible cases render as non-tappable stubs. Extracted shared CaseSummaryTile (also used by animal lifetime list) showing start–end span. Added ended_at to case_summaries view (migration 1700000018, latest disposition date) + CaseSummary.endedAt. Verified on live PB (50 checks); analyze clean, 150+14 tests green.

Statistics screen (coord/supervisor, via dashboard app-bar action + /statistics route): KPI cards (total/open cases, avg time in care) + breakdowns by outcome (terminal disposition per case), species (intakes), condition. Org-wide for those roles via existing repos, no backend. Pure computeStatistics() + provider; outcomes keyed by DispositionType, species/conditions ranked. canViewReports role helper. Unit + widget tests; analyze clean, 158+14 green. Unblocks FED-7.3 (CSV) + 7.7 (PDF).

CSV export on Statistics screen: per-case rows (number/species/name/dates/status/outcome/days-in-care/city/region/reasons), org-wide for coord/supervisor. csv package (CsvEncoder + UTF-8 BOM), delivered via share_plus (mobile share / web download). ISO dates, localized labels. Pure buildCaseReportRows + encodeCaseReportCsv unit-tested. Loads inline from keep-alive repos (autoDispose provider disposed mid-await). Verified working by user. analyze clean, 161 tests green. M3 reached. Unblocks FED-7.7 (PDF).

Case sharing UI: Share action on case detail (gated to active carer/supervisor) opens a sheet listing current shares (access + revoke) and granting read/edit shares to eligible org members (excludes self, active carer, already-shared). New caseShares provider + shareAccessLabel; reuses orgMembers/memberLabel. DropdownButtonFormField picker (DropdownMenu overlapped in the sheet). Widget tests; analyze clean, 163 green.

Visibility fully verified in test_rules.py: matrix (private default, read/edit shares, coordinator all-read, supervisor all, org isolation) already covered; added carer-driven opt-in share lifecycle (outsider cannot grant; owner grants read share -> recipient views not edits; revoke removes access). 57 backend checks pass on a live PB stack.
Phase 5 — Sharing & visibility complete: FED-5.1 case sharing UI + FED-5.2 visibility verification (57 backend checks).

Aviary CRUD: new Aviaries nav tab lists org aviaries (keeper/location/capacity/inactive badge); coord/supervisor create+edit via form sheet (name/keeper/location/capacity/active/notes), all view. New aviariesProvider + canManageAviaries; reuses orgMembers. Widget tests; analyze clean, 167 green. Unblocks FED-6.2 + FED-4.12.

Disposition 'placed in aviary' added to the sheet (required active-aviary picker). Product decision: placement is terminal — hook sets case status=disposed + animal lifetime_status=in_aviary + current_aviary; resident falling ill = new case (no permanent_care status; see federfall-aviary-placement-closes-case memory). New activeAviaries provider. Widget test + rule test (57 backend checks). analyze clean, 168 green. M2 capstone.

Aviary detail/occupancy: /aviaries/:id shows identity + occupancy chip (residents/capacity) + resident animals (current_aviary == aviary), tap-through to animal lifetime detail; coord/supervisor edit action. aviaryById/aviaryResidents providers; list row now opens detail. Widget tests; analyze clean, 171 green.
Phase 6 — Aviaries complete: FED-6.1 aviary CRUD + FED-6.2 residents/occupancy + FED-4.12 disposition->placed in aviary (closes case, animal becomes resident).

Markings now manageable from the animal lifetime detail: showMarkingSheet caseId optional; animal detail markings section has apply (no case) + per-marking edit/mark-removed/delete; applied_in_case null when outside a case. Case timeline view unchanged. Widget test; analyze clean, 172 green.
Case detail now has an 'Open animal record' app-bar action -> /animals/:id, closing the case<->animal nav loop. Avatar stays photo-edit; separate affordance. analyze clean, 172 green.

Animal detail has a 'New case' action -> /cases/new?animal=<id>; NewCaseScreen takes optional animalId and preloads it as the linked animal (skips re-id). Residents reach it via their animal detail. Widget test; analyze clean, 173 green.

Weights animal-scoped: migration 1700000020 adds required animal, case optional, backfills, animal-owns-cascade, org-wide access (animal identity layer like markings). Weight model gains animal (caseId nullable); entry sheet takes animalId + optional caseId; weightsForAnimal provider + repo.forAnimal. Verified on live PB (56 checks: org-wide weight, recordable with no case). analyze clean, 173+14 green.

Animal detail Weight section: latest reading + record-weight action (no case) + life-long trend. WeightTrendChart.forCase / forAnimal; case overview keeps case-window, animal shows lifetime curve. Widget test; analyze clean, 174 green.

Animal-centric records complete: markings/weight/photo + new-case shortcut all work without an open case from the animal hub; case<->animal navigation closed; weights animal-scoped (migration 1700000020). 5 tasks.
Team roster screen with role + status badges; invite moved into a sheet
Member management sheet: role change, active toggle, remove; self-edit guarded
Org settings screen: name/contact + finder retention; new PbOrganisationsRepository + currentOrganisation provider
Condition code-list editor: list/add/edit/delete, org-scoped create; admin menu consolidation
UX Phase A complete: team roster, member management, org settings, condition code-list
Edit-animal sheet (name/species/sex) from the animal detail
Profile self-edit (name/phone) via AuthRepository.updateProfile + auth-store refresh
Edit-case-intake sheet (reasons/age/dates/location/weight/notes), carer+supervisor gated
Disposition edit/delete + reconciliation hooks (re-open case, revert animal); verified via run.sh
UX Phase B complete: edit case intake, animal identity, dispositions (with re-open), and profile self-edit

Decided: 3-state lifecycle in_care -> ready_for_release -> disposed. Drop in_treatment/rehab (treatment detail lives in the timeline). ready_for_release is a manual flag; disposed set by disposition hook.
3-state lifecycle (migration+enum) + bottom actions card (status/edit/share), carer/supervisor gated; overflow fixed
Handoff/move split with clear titles + same-carer guard; handoff surfaced on actions card. Reassign stays tied to a placement record.

Covered by C.2 + create rule: coordinator creates a case (becomes active_carer) then hands off; supervisors can reassign any case. Cross-case re-routing by coordinators deemed unnecessary — no rule change.
UX Phase C complete: 3-state lifecycle + actions card (C.1), handoff/move split + handoff surfaced (C.2); coordinator routing covered by create+handoff so C.3 closed without a rule change.
AnimalAvatar as leading in case list + animals registry; aviary residents aligned to radius 20
Quarantine shown on case Overview (with ended state) + editable/liftable via intake sheet (future-date picker). Worklist integration deferred to Phase D.

exams + exam_findings migration added (1700000025), applies clean via migrate up; 73/73 rule tests pass
Exam + ExamFinding freezed models + Hydration/Mentation/BodySystem/FindingStatus wire enums; analyze clean, 17/17 model tests pass
PbExamsRepository + PbExamFindingsRepository (forCase grandparent-traversal single query) + app providers; analyze clean, repo tests pass
Exam timeline kind: providers + showExamSheet (3-zone form) + ExamTile + timeline wiring + de/en l10n + labels; app analyze clean, 223/223 app tests pass (incl. new exam sheet + timeline tests)
Optional structured exam delivered across 4 subtasks: backend collections, models, repositories, timeline UI. Intake-time entry + animal-lifetime aggregation deferred to blp.4/blp.5.

Optional intake-time exam: SwitchListTile opt-in on new_case_screen; _create now captures the created case and opens showExamSheet on it before popping (never blocks intake). de/en l10n + test; analyze clean, 224/224 app tests pass.

Exam now captures weight (→Weight entry, create-path), temperature + mucous-membrane vitals (typed selects). Intake weight kept as fast-path but writes a Weight entry; removed from edit sheet + case detail. Dropped 14 dead cases.exam_* columns + Case model fields; backfill migration intake_weight_g→weights. migrate up clean, 73/73 rule tests, models 17/17, app 224/224.

examsForAnimal provider + read-only Exams roll-up section on animal detail (vitals summary, taps through to the case). Backend rule tests: 10 new exams/exam_findings assertions incl. the grandchild exam.case traversal — 83/83. App analyze clean, 225/225 tests.

All 18 children complete — Phase 4 core case lifecycle done (intake, detail, weights/trend, conditions, meds, journal, placements, dispositions, markings, structured exam + clinical-field reconciliation).

Map picker refined (2fa): center-pin + movable-map model (reverse-geocode on settle), polished rounded/elevated search bar with clear button + no-matches/error states, selected-address card (primary/secondary), GPS 'my location' FAB via geolocator (Android/iOS perms + web). New widget tests; analyze clean, 228/228 app tests.
Stepped wizard implemented (header + per-step validation + Back/Next), sex field removed from intake. Analyze clean, 228/228 app tests (intake tests rewritten to walk the wizard).

Shared ImageViewerScreen: full-screen, PageView swipe, pinch + double-tap zoom, share via share_plus/http. Replaced the ad-hoc Dialog viewers in case detail + journal tile. No new dep; analyze clean, 231/231 app tests (+3 viewer tests).
Added desktop/web navigation to the image viewer: arrow-key paging + on-screen prev/next buttons (shown when multiple images, edge-aware). analyze clean, 233/233 app tests.

connectivity_plus + onlineStatus (interface + ServerProbe /api/health) + OfflineBanner. Plus the core read-path fix: PbRepository now caps every request at networkTimeout (no more multi-minute hang on an unreachable server) and, when onlineStatus already knows we're offline, serves the cache instantly / fails writes fast. data 11/11, app 235/235, analyze clean.

Offline write/error copy is now clear and reassuring (offline + retry + entry kept), paired with the fail-fast writes from 2o3.1. Single mapping point (errorOffline) so it's consistent across all 41 call sites.

Pull-to-refresh added to cases list, animals registry, aviaries, and case detail (both tabs). Case detail reuses a new invalidateCaseTimeline helper (kept next to CaseTimeline's source list). analyze clean, 235/235.

Realtime live-sync (Pattern A): collectionEvents SSE provider + CaseLive notifier (case detail) + worklistLive (worklist). Events only TRIGGER the existing loaders via invalidateCaseTimeline / invalidate(worklist) — one data path shared with pull-to-refresh; no hand-merged second copy. Re-subscribes on reconnect and catches up. analyze clean, 235/235.

Offline/sync Phase 1 complete: connectivity + offline banner, fail-fast offline reads/writes (timeout + known-offline short-circuit), graceful offline messaging, consistent pull-to-refresh, and realtime live-sync (case detail + worklist) via the invalidation pattern. Phases 2 (offline write outbox) and 3 (full offline-first) remain deferred.

Reusable WidgetRef.liveRefresh(collections, onChange) primitive; wired into dashboard summary + Today card, cases list, animals registry, aviaries, statistics, and animal lifetime detail. Migrated worklistLive onto it (deleted the provider; collections now a public const). One consistent pattern; analyze clean, 235/235.

Protected the three clinical/finder-linked file fields (cases.intake_photos, journal_entries.attachments, animals.photo) via migration 1700000027; client appends a short-lived file token (fileTokenProvider -> pb.files.getToken(), ~90s cache) to file URLs via fileUrl(token:). Verified by backend rule tests (bare URL rejected, same-org token works, cross-org token rejected) + data-layer unit test. Thumbnail cache-churn deferred to federfall-xu3.

Implemented via cached_network_image with a token-stripped cacheKey (CachedFileImage + fileCacheKey in lib/ui/widgets/cached_file_image.dart). CachedNetworkImageProvider keys its in-memory ImageCache on cacheKey??url, so a rotated ~90s file token resolves to the same entry (no re-decode/re-fetch); on mobile flutter_cache_manager keys disk on cacheKey too and honors PB's Cache-Control (max-age=30d, verified via live probe). Honors server caching rather than forcing per-open revalidation, per product decision. Applied to intake photos, journal attachments, animal avatar, full-screen viewer. Tests: cached_file_image_test + updated image_viewer_test.
Fixed via ref.mounted guard pattern across collection_events, connectivity, auth_status, current_user, and fileToken. Verified: flutter analyze clean, 238 app tests pass.

Decided the current org-wide animals/aviaries visibility model is fine as-is; carer-scoping not pursued.
Fixed: watch 'case_shares' on cases browser, case-detail live-sync, and dashboard KPIs so a share/revoke refetches live. flutter analyze clean. Pending live two-user verification.

Not reproducible. Traced the suspected repro (fresh user, zero cases, expanded/wide width): the cases ShellRoute section-root renders DetailPanePlaceholder, not a detail. The 'Not found' string comes only from CaseDetailScreen 404ing caseByIdProvider, which requires a real /cases/:id match — nothing auto-navigates there for an empty list (no auto-select, no route persistence). A repro test at 1400px width with an empty cases repo showed the placeholder, not not-found. 'Not found' only legitimately appears when navigating to a specific stale/invalid case id (bookmarked URL, or a case deleted/unshared live), which is correct behavior.

Domain/repo coverage delivered to well past the ~80% target: federfall_models hand-written mappers 99.2% (was ~9% — added mapper tests for all previously-uncovered models incl. the whole clinical.dart, case_share, organisation, aviary, app_user, finder, marking, condition/case_condition, case_activity), federfall_data repositories 87.7% (was 50% — added query tests for every thin repo + clinical repos, and auth-repo tests for oauth/otp/mfa/profile/refresh paths). 78 data tests + 47 model tests, all green, dart analyze clean. Golden tests and patrol E2E split out to follow-ups federfall-aws (FED-8.4a) and federfall-jc7 (FED-8.4b) per decision that coverage is the deliverable.

All 8 children complete: server config/first-run (6q4, 7nf.1), single-container web serving (7nf.2), login & session (vi5), invite/approval (ul9), minimal case slice (n34), role-gated nav & profile (5pq), and end-to-end self-hostable instance (bak). M1 walking skeleton delivered.

All non-deferred children complete (9/10): nav shell (ctw.1), dashboard (cqv), statistics (93o), all-cases browser (ctw.2), animals registry (ctw.3), animal lifetime detail (ctw.4), dashboard->browser wiring (ctw.6), header avatar (ctw.7), CSV export (z7j). The only remaining child, FED-7.7 PDF annual report export (ctw.5, P3), is deferred and stays tracked on its own — out of scope for closing this M3 epic.
Upgraded shared EmptyView with headline + primary CTA; wired activation CTAs into cases/animals/aviaries empty states. l10n added (en+de), analyze clean, tests green.

Implemented all three: (1) KPI numbers -> displaySmall w600 + tabular figures, label demoted to labelLarge/onSurfaceVariant; (2) KPI icons seated in primaryContainer chips, chevron moved beside label; (3) cards switched from hairline outline to surfaceContainerLow fill (theme). analyze clean, dashboard tests green. Pending commit.

Dashboard hierarchy: Today now always leads (mobile shows the compact 'all caught up' card instead of vanishing), with an icon-chip header + due-count subtitle so the actionable section reads as primary and the KPI grid as reference below it. Kept the 50h KPI cards rather than shrinking to chips.
Fixed in this session — see description.

Login first-impression redesign shipped (commit 9c172da): brand-first header — app-name wordmark + tagline, AppBar removed, server name demoted; sign-in behaviour unchanged. The actual logo/brand mark is out of scope here and tracked as its own design task.

Implemented geocode_cache collection (migration 1700000035) + cache read/write in geocode.pb.js with normalized keys, positive/negative TTLs (env-configurable), hit tracking, hook-only access, and a daily purge cron. Validated live: forward 346ms→2ms, reverse rounding-bucket hit 114ms→1.7ms, hits increment correctly.

Implemented across 3 commits on main (3f4b0aa, 7544538, dd0b25e): quarantine_records collection + case_quarantine view + backfill/drop-column migrations + org-aware default hook; Quarantine/CaseQuarantine models, repos, providers; timeline sheet/tile with started+ended entries and inline 'end now'; org-wide default setting + per-case override at intake; worklist+dashboard read the view; l10n de/en. Gates green (analyze clean; 287 app + 47 models + 69 data tests). Migrations applied to dev stack. In-app behavioural spot-check left to the user.

Added reportCaughtError() helper routing broad 'on Object' catches through AppLogger; applied to all 42 UI/provider catch sites so swallowed errors stay observable. result.dart left as-is (it propagates via Err).
Verified live by user: migration applies + backfills, org-scoped/supervisor-only rules work, runtime-editable admission reasons function end-to-end.
Verified live by user: migration backfill, supervisor-only/org-scoped rules, runtime-editable marking types work end-to-end.
Implemented + committed (4c51c0f). Verified working alongside the other two code lists; medication_due view recreated cleanly, supervisor-only/org-scoped rules in place.

Fixed by migration 1700000043_immutable_boundary_relations.js: update rules on case_shares (case/shared_with/org), cases (org), all case child collections (case/org) and exam_findings (exam/org) now reject requests that include the boundary fields (@request.body.X:isset = false). case_shares.access stays mutable. Rule tests cover share re-point, child + grandchild re-point, and legit updates; suite green (113 passed).

NewCaseScreen now mixes in DiscardGuard: Form(onChanged: markDirty) + markDirty on every non-form input, body wrapped in guardUnsavedChanges. Back gesture/AppBar back/scrim prompt to confirm while any field is dirty. Tests cover pristine-pops-silently and dirty-prompts (keep-editing vs discard). Commit 364dd95.

On successful intake the wizard now context.go(/cases/<id>) instead of context.pop() to the list; the intake-exam path also lands on the case after the sheet closes. Test asserts landing on the created case. Commit 364dd95.

AppTextField gained maxLines/minLines/textCapitalization; applied to all 16 prose fields (journal, intake/exam/weight/med notes, instructions, comments, reasons, descriptions) with sentence capitalization. Commit on main.

Atomic intake via POST /api/federfall/intake (pb_hooks/intake.pb.js): finder+animal+case+intake weight+quarantine override in one server-side transaction; cases.finder locked via 1700000044 (create+update isset guard, also closes 9hy); client sends one call incl. photos (@jsonPayload multipart). 138 backend + 291 app tests green.

Handoff derived server-side: placements onRecordCreate updates cases.active_carer from to_user in the same transaction and pins from_user to the real current carer; client no longer PATCHes the case and shows a confirmation dialog before handing off.

Closed by the federfall-zod fix: cases.finder can no longer be set or re-pointed by clients (migration 1700000044); linking happens only inside the intake route with server-controlled finder creation.

Fixed in main.pb.js: seq derived numerically in SQL (COALESCE/MAX/CAST over substr), prefix match anchored with LIKE 'YYYY-%' so manual numbers like ALT-2026-1 can't pollute, and a no-op UPDATE on the org row grabs SQLite's write lock before the max is read so concurrent creates serialize instead of racing (unique index stays as final guard). Tests: crosses 1000, foreign-format pollution. UTC-year/multi-org follow-up: federfall-28m.

Migration 1700000045_guest_wall_refresh.js re-runs the guest-exclusion rewrite idempotently (normalize then re-apply) across all collections; down reverts only the six post-33 collections. test_rules.py gained a guest sweep (member sees / guest sees none) over admission_reasons, marking_types, medication_routes, quarantine_records, case_quarantine, animal_species. CLAUDE.md + migration comment now mandate the guest-safe predicate.

Already largely implemented as the AsyncValueView widget (lib/ui/widgets/async_value_view.dart): default LoadingView/ErrorView with retry + l10n, skipLoadingOnRefresh/Reload, adopted by all 16 async screens. Error logging exists as a better choke point: LoggingProviderObserver.providerDidFail logs every provider failure app-wide (catches even unrendered failures), so the view stays render-only. This session moved the errorMessage(l10n, e) mapping INTO AsyncValueView as the default and removed the identical boilerplate from all 16 call sites (commit a5089e9). The one remaining raw .when() (new_case_screen re-id search) is genuinely custom (inline spinner, intentionally silent error) and was left as-is. Kept the widget form over an extension: const-able, testable, already established.

Lockout guard in main.pb.js: users onRecordUpdateRequest + onRecordDeleteRequest block demoting/deactivating/moving/deleting the last active supervisor of an org (applies to superusers too; env bootstrap stays the recovery path). Tested in test_rules.py [last-supervisor lockout guard].

Migration 1700000047: weights deleteRule = supervisor OR author (guest-safe predicate). Author is populated by both the app sheet and the intake hook, so the own-entry correction path keeps working. Tested in test_rules.py [weights delete guard].

oauth2_provisioning.pb.js only sets verified=true when the provider reported the email verified (ou.email); the rawUser.email fallback stays usable but unverified (roster shows invite-pending badge; guest wall keys off role so nobody is blocked). FEDERFALL_OIDC_TRUST_EMAIL=true overrides for vetted private IdPs. Bootstrap race documented in docs/DEPLOYMENT.md + backend README.

geocode.pb.js registers PocketBase rate-limit rules for /api/federfall/geocode + /geocode/ (per client IP, default 30 req / 60 s, FEDERFALL_GEOCODE_RATE_MAX/_WINDOW tunable, 0 disables; burst-friendly per user guidance) and caps q at 256 chars. When PB rate limiting was off we enable it with ONLY the geocode rules so nothing else gets throttled; operator-managed rule sets are merged. Tested in test_rules.py [geocode proxy guards] incl. 429 flood.

weight_entry_tile.dart gates the delete menu item on weightDeletableBy(weight, me) (new helper in core/auth/roles.dart): only the weight's author or a supervisor sees it, mirroring migration 1700000047. Edit stays gated by canEdit as before. Widget tests cover author-deletes, non-author-hidden, supervisor-sees-delete.

CSV export catch now shows errorMessage(l10n, e) instead of the raw exception (statistics_screen.dart).
Unnumbered case tile is titled by the animal label (fallback l10n.worklistUnnumberedCase); animal drops out of the subtitle to avoid duplication.
Shared confirmSignOut() dialog in core/auth/sign_out.dart; wired into profile_screen and pending_approval_screen. New l10n key authSignOutConfirm.

Detail header chip renders in errorContainer colors when residents > capacity (DetailHeader.chipAlert); aviaries list shows occupancy '3 / 8' via new aviaryOccupancyCounts provider plus an error icon when over. Disposition-sheet aviary picker left as-is (list now surfaces the full aviary beforehand).

buildWorklist emits quarantineEnding for ends up to quarantineGraceDays=3 in the past, still neutral/upcoming; label shows 'Ended yesterday / N days ago' (worklistQuarantineEndedDaysAgo). Tests updated.

Fixed: transactional hook route POST /api/federfall/exam persists exam + findings (+ optional exam weight) in one server-side tx; exam_sheet.dart now makes a single saveWithFindings() call. Atomicity covered by test_rules.py [atomic exam route] incl. 'failed edit keeps the previous findings intact'.
Open-caseload guard enforced in the users onRecordDeleteRequest hook (main.pb.js); superuser + supervisor deletes of a carer with open cases now 400. Covered in test_rules.py [member removal].

False positive: users.deleteRule was already supervisor-scoped — the review read the DOWN migration of 1700000010_access_rules.js (line 158). Verified live (supervisor delete → 204). Added non-superuser delete coverage to test_rules.py, which uncovered the real removal bug: deleting a member with only DISPOSED cases failed because PB's active_carer cleanup fired the share-on-handoff hook, creating a share for the vanished user. Hook now skips the share when the old carer no longer exists.

Added networkTimeout (default 15s) to PbAuthRepository (all methods except the OAuth2 flow, which waits on user interaction) and PbGeocodingRepository; timeouts map to the same network RepositoryException as PbRepository.

GeoResult.fromJson replaced by GeoResult.tryParse: skips non-map entries and missing/mistyped lat/lon instead of fabricating (0,0). reverse() treats a malformed result as unresolved. _guard widened to mirror PbRepository (timeout, ClientException, catch-all wrap). Tests added.
intake() now validates res.id/res.animal are non-empty strings and throws RepositoryException(unknownOutcome) otherwise — no more empty-string ids routing to a 404. Test added.

New RepositoryErrorKind.unknownOutcome: write timeouts (create/update/delete/*WithFiles, intake, exam saveWithFindings) now surface as 'may or may not have been saved' instead of network/'not reached'; new l10n string (en+de) wired in errorMessage(). Idempotency keys for intake filed as federfall-3ty3.
updateProfile uses null-aware map elements: omitted args leave the field unchanged, explicit empty string clears. Interface doc updated; tests pin the partial-argument semantics.

Added: intake() suite (payload/photo forwarding, id parsing, malformed response, timeout kind, ClientException mapping), updateProfile partial-arg + clear-via-empty-string tests, geocoding malformed-entry/shape/timeout tests, write-timeout kind test in pb_repository_test. Items (b) pbDate-malformed and (d) unknown Disposition wire were already covered by converters_test.dart:22 and mappers_test.dart:115.

Not a bug: filterCases compares date-only inclusively (DateUtils.dateOnly + isAfter), so the range ending DateTime(year,12,31) already includes all of Dec 31 — KPI and drill-down agree. The suggested fix (end Jan 1 exclusive) would instead wrongly include Jan 1 of the next year under the day-inclusive filter.
FEDERFALL_TRUSTED_PROXY_HEADERS (+_USE_LEFTMOST_IP) applied via settings.pb.js on boot; documented in docker-compose.yml + DEPLOYMENT.md. Commit 34a624a.

Strict same-origin CSP on SPA paths + 'default-src none; sandbox' on /api/files/ in web_headers.pb.js. Bundle made fully same-origin (external flutter_bootstrap.js, --no-web-resources-cdn, bundled Roboto). Verified headless against the real wasm bundle: boots, crossOriginIsolated, zero violations, zero external requests. Emoji-fallback tofu tradeoff documented; FEDERFALL_CSP override available. Commit b3c941d.

idempotency_key on POST /api/federfall/intake: stored with response in the intake transaction (idempotency_keys collection, per-user unique, 24h TTL + purge cron); replay returns original result. Wizard sends one stable key per intake; keyed timeout now a plain network error. Exam route left for a follow-up if wanted. Commit a895685.

Implemented in de8c3a3. flutter_local_notifications 22 + timezone; keepAlive reconciler over the worklist source with realtime listeners; opt-in profile toggle with permission flow (notification + best-effort exact-alarm, inexact fallback); stable per-prescription notification ids; UTC-instant scheduling (no tz plugin needed); tap deep-links to the case incl. terminated-state launch; cancel-all on sign-out/toggle-off; web no-op. Decisions: past-due doses are skipped (worklist owns them, avoids re-firing on every launch); 'changes by others lag until next open' limitation documented in the toggle subtitle and provider docs. analyze clean, 335 tests green, dev APK builds.
Closed
Persist last-visited route + restore on cold start (covers Android process death); restorationScopeId added to MaterialApp.router

Added migration 1700000051 tightening users.updateRule to also constrain the request body's org field (equal to caller's org or unset), closing the cross-org escalation for both the self-update and supervisor-update branches. Added 3 assertions to test_rules.py (cross-org move of another user, cross-org self-move, same-org update still allowed) — full suite (214/214) passes.

Set android:allowBackup="false" on the main AndroidManifest.xml <application> tag. App is online-only with the server as sole source of truth, so nothing is lost by disabling Auto Backup/device transfer; this removes the flutter_cache_manager SQLite catalog + shared_preferences from any backup path.

Pinned per-arch SHA256 checksums (from PocketBase v0.39.4's published checksums.txt) in the Dockerfile pbfetch stage and added a sha256sum -c verification step before unzip. Verified: build succeeds with the correct hash, and fails loudly with a corrupted/wrong hash (tested both). Comment instructs updating the checksums when PB_VERSION is bumped.

Fixed: placements hook (main.pb.js) now validates to_user exists, is_active, and matches the case's org before deriving active_carer; rejects otherwise. Covered by 4 new assertions in test_rules.py (nonexistent/foreign-org/deactivated to_user + active_carer unchanged). 220/220 backend tests pass.

Fixed: both geocode routes (geocode.pb.js) now reject guest-role tokens with 403, matching intake.pb.js/exam.pb.js. Check runs before any upstream Nominatim call. Covered by 2 new test_rules.py assertions. 220/220 backend tests pass.

Fixed in oauth2_provisioning.pb.js: (1) 'first user' now keyed on 'no users record exists at all' instead of 'no active supervisor right now', so a batch-deactivated instance can't be re-bootstrapped by the next arbitrary OAuth2 sign-in — recovery stays on the operator-only bootstrap_supervisor.pb.js env path. (2) FEDERFALL_OIDC_ALLOWED_GROUPS gating now applies to the bootstrap user too. (3) Concurrent first sign-ins are reconciled post-commit (earliest created+id wins, later one demoted to guest) since the JSVM has no cross-request mutex. No automated test: OAuth2 flow test infra doesn't exist yet (tracked separately in federfall-8qz) — verified by code review + confirming the hook still loads/starts cleanly (run.sh boots successfully, 220/220 other tests pass).

Tapping the animal photo now opens a full-screen zoomable viewer (full-res, not the 200x200 avatar thumbnail); an edit action inside the viewer reaches the existing set/replace/remove sheet. No-photo tap still goes straight to the edit sheet.
won't fix — a UTC boundary case at midnight on Jan 1 CET, not worth the org-local-timezone complexity

Implemented supervisor animal-merge: backend merge-animals.pb.js endpoint, MergeAnimalScreen UI (search duplicate, survivor picker, per-field diff, moves summary), roles.canMergeAnimals gate, l10n, and tests.

Already done in 7d06801 (dedupe case-timeline tile menus, tag chip, weight date field) prior to issue filing — shared TagChip in lib/ui/widgets/tag_chip.dart, exported via ui.dart, used by both condition_entry_tile.dart and medication_tiles.dart with nullable color/onColor defaulting to secondaryContainer/onSecondaryContainer. No local _Tag copies remain.

Already implemented in ff335e7 (extract shared SheetScaffold + FormSheetState mixin), which the commit message states closes this issue. lib/ui/form_sheet.dart added; all 12 sheets migrated; flutter analyze clean.

aviary_stays ledger + centralized animals hook shipped: migration 1700000052, pb_hooks/aviary_stays.pb.js, AviaryStay model+repo, backfill, guest-safe access rules, python rule tests pass live

journal_entries extended to dual-parent (case OR aviary): migration 1700000053 preserves the 621 immutability guard + adds aviary, XOR hook, JournalEntry.caseId nullable + aviary field, forAviary repo method, JournalEntrySheet/Tile generalized for both parents, l10n already parent-agnostic. AviaryDetailScreen restructured into Bestand/Pflege tabs (LayoutBuilder pane-width split at kCaseDetailTwoColumnMin, matching case detail); AviaryFlockTimeline merges aviary journal entries (editable) with a client-computed, HISTORICAL condition rollup (aviary_stays windows -> animals' cases -> case_conditions, chunked byCases query) that survives a resident moving aviaries; condition tiles deep-link to the source case. Final verification pass for the flock-care feature (d5co.1-3): live-PB python rule tests 241/241 (incl. guest sweep, aviary_stays, dual-parent journal_entries); flutter analyze clean; flutter test 406/406 green; coverage 77.55% (>=75% gate); dart format clean repo-wide; build_runner + gen-l10n regenerate as no-ops (codegen already committed-consistent). No code changes needed — all criteria were already satisfied incrementally by d5co.1-3.

All 4 children shipped: aviary_stays residency ledger + centralized animals hook (d5co.1), dual-parent journal_entries case/aviary (d5co.2), AviaryDetailScreen Bestand/Pflege tabs + flock timeline with historical health rollup (d5co.3), full verification pass — 241/241 live-PB rule tests, 406/406 flutter tests, coverage 77.55%, analyze/format clean (d5co.4). Flock-level care (REQUIREMENTS.md §11.7) is complete: occupancy view, group journal entries, and a residency-scoped health rollup that survives residents moving aviaries.

Migration 1700000054 adds is_contagious (mirrors is_notifiable), backfilling the launch org's seeded list for bird-to-bird transmissible diagnoses (Trichomonadose, PMV, Ornithose/Chlamydiose, Salmonellose, Kokzidiose, Endoparasiten, Ektoparasiten, Taubenpocken). Condition model + codelist admin (CodelistSpec.contagious, generalized SwitchListTile/badge) + case condition tile + aviary flock rollup tile all updated. Fixed a latent overflow bug in CodelistSheet (never wrapped in a scrollable, unlike SheetScaffold-based sheets) exposed by the third switch. 241/241 live-PB tests, 407/407 flutter tests, analyze/format clean.
MVP release shipped: Android/iOS/Web builds out, German store metadata done. INTERNET permission fix (a929bfc) verified in merged productionRelease manifest.

Implemented and verified end-to-end: Dockerfile bundles typst 0.15.0 (checksum-verified), backend/pocketbase/typst/report.typ + vendored codetastic QR package, pb_hooks/case_report.pb.js (GET /api/federfall/cases/{id}/report.pdf, mirrors the cases view rule), frontend repo/provider/UI in case_detail_screen.dart's app bar via share_plus. All hardcoded German (see federfall-qdsa). backend/pocketbase/tests/test_rules.py covers the auth/org/share permission matrix - 250/250 passing against a real built container. Manually verified a real PDF via the live API: correct layout, umlauts, QR code, localized dates.

Feature shipped: server-side PDF case report (b43116d/b4e10ef/52a6397/1bfa526) plus the i18n refactor (STRINGS/renderEvent/?lang=) already committed in HEAD's report.typ and case_report.pb.js.

Verified end-to-end on real hardware: profile screen's Printer section scans/connects/saves a device (network TCP verified against the Epson TM-T88IV) and Test print produces physical output. usb_serial's Gradle-9 incompatibility was resolved via a dependency_overrides pin to a maintained fork (AppsDevTeam/usbserial@v0.8.0) rather than downgrading the whole project's Gradle version or a from-scratch stub package -- see pubspec.yaml comment for the verification trail (API surface diffed against the hosted 0.5.2).

All 5 phases delivered and verified end-to-end on real hardware (Epson TM-T88IV, network/TCP): server-side Typst receipt rendering with dynamic widthDots, receipt PNG data-layer fetch, printer connectivity/settings UI, case-detail print action, and a full test/quality-gate pass. User confirmed live: test print, case receipt print, and plain PDF share all work on the physical printer. Two real regressions were caught and fixed via live testing beyond what flutter test could catch on its own: (1) unified_esc_pos_printer's unconditional dart:io/dart:ffi imports broke the web/wasm build outright despite !kIsWeb guards — resolved via a dart.library.io conditional-import seam so only one file touches the plugin; (2) case_report.pb.js's widthDots presence check used '!== null' where PocketBase's query API returns '' for an absent param, silently breaking every plain PDF request in production until caught from live server logs.

Implemented: CasesScreen auto-widens to all-cases scope when the case open in the detail pane isn't in the 'mine' filtered list; guarded to not re-trigger after a manual switch back. Added widget tests.
